title: cynoglossum microglochin var. nervosum
intro: Cynoglossum microglochin var. nervosum, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not, is an herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and easing menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum microglochin var. nervosum is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to treat various ailments.
